CAVEAT_parity_gap: These numbers come from tokenizers-library-loaded tokenizer.json, NOT the compiled Rust binary. Spot-checked on chromosome.txt: real Rust binary = 114 tokens/0 UNK, this HF-format load = 115 tokens/1 UNK on the byte-identical input. A genuine, newly-found Python/Rust parity gap (5th sharp-end-adjacent finding), distinct from the already-registered whitespace round-trip bug. Not authoritative production numbers -- reported as measured, with this caveat, not silently smoothed over.
